steps.name: product-surface-inventory
steps.summary: FPS1 inventoried existing demo, review-pack, runtime gate, and narrative surfaces; selected the 1116 lease review pack with authority and private-runtime boundary as the first firm-facing walkthrough.

steps.name: operator-demo-command
steps.summary: FPS2 added scripts/firm_facing_operator_demo_command.py and tests/test_firm_facing_operator_demo_command.py. The command writes docs/reports/2026-07-05-fps2-operator-demo-command.md with 1116 review pack output, five-role authority boundary counts, client-private runtime boundary summary, and verification status from closed runtime/RAG reports.

steps.name: readiness-checklist
steps.summary: FPS3 added scripts/firm_facing_readiness_checklist.py and tests/test_firm_facing_readiness_checklist.py. The report fixes the local install/run path, required files, expected outputs, protected-data boundary, and human-review boundary for the firm-facing demo.

steps.name: product-narrative-readme
steps.summary: FPS4 replaced the README Product PoC Demo section with a Firm-Facing Local Demo section and added scripts/firm_facing_product_narrative.py plus tests/test_firm_facing_product_narrative.py to verify capability, non-goal, and demo-command wording.

steps.name: product-surface-close-gate
steps.summary: FPS5 added scripts/firm_facing_product_surface_gate.py and tests/test_firm_facing_product_surface_gate.py. The close report ties FPS1~FPS4 reports to carried quality_preflight, rag_quality_final_gate, default retriever guard, multi-authority runtime gate, and client-private parser runtime gate verification.
